query: Blue Origin New Shepard pause flights redirect resources human lunar lander Artemis 2026

reasoning: Both sets confirm the core facts: Jan 30, 2026 announcement, pause of New Shepard for at least two years, redirection of resources to lunar human landing capabilities tied to Artemis.
